title: Hunt: veal parm in capital district
intent: Create a high-quality Mosaic map for "veal parm in capital district" using current, verifiable, place-specific evidence before any public data promotion.
scope: Research the topic broadly enough to produce a useful first review batch while respecting the quality gates.
mustHaveConstraints: Exact street-level address for every candidate
Current or recent evidence of relevance
Verified real photos tied to the actual place and map intent
exclusions: Stock photos, generic storefronts, parking lots, or unrelated visuals
Closed, stale, or weakly evidenced places
Generic chains or filler unless explicitly requested and justified
photoPolicy: Use only real, location-tied photos that visibly show the thing the map is about. Keep unresolved photo work in review artifacts, not public entries.json.
qualityTargets: Research artifacts first; no raw candidate may write directly to public/data/maps
Promotion requires exact address, valid coordinates, recent evidence, and verified real photos
Rejected candidates must keep a rejection reason for review
